summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Learning & Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people development—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

changeLog: 2026-05-30: Tailored for Robinhood — Manager of Learning & Development (Chicago/Menlo/NY, 5 days in-office → Chicago header). Summary → Learning & Development, systematic approaches. InGenius → Set A: end-to-end program design + scalable standards/templates, learning materials via AI + content audits, intake/scope alignment with business partners, needs assessments + evaluation frameworks. Reordered to lead with design/standards. ODN → Pair A. NextGen → 'training evaluation' framing (direct JD match). Vestas → Inclusive Leadership workshop lead + M&A learning support (JD preferred). Skills → led with LMS + Instructional Design + prompt engineering, kept HRCI. NOTE: JD wants 8+ yrs instructional design + 2+ yrs management; Jamie is ~3 yrs and not yet a people-manager — genuine seniority stretch; tailored truthfully to design/standards/evaluation/AI strengths.
